points.first: WooCommerce: The final price may vary depending on the plugins and features you need. We'll advise you with no obligation.
points.second: Shopify: The monthly Shopify subscription (from $29/month) and transaction fees are independent of our service.
points.third: Premium themes or additional features are quoted separately based on your specific needs.
